messages.body: Hi Acme Foods, we need this multi_item_purchase_order order: 12 x Robusta coffee bags @ 21 USD, 20 x Ceylon tea cartons @ 18 USD.
Confirmed. Subtotal is 612 USD. We'll process as single PO, split into 2 lots.
Shipping address is 102 Market Street, Customer Hub. Payment terms: Net 30.
Noted. Sales order draft will be shared today.
